overall.description: A nighttime walk through a rainy historic city street in Red Dead Redemption 2, featuring wet cobblestone roads illuminated by gas lamps, vintage architecture, and a horse-drawn carriage moving through the scene. The atmosphere is moody and immersive with reflective wet surfaces and warm artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic cobblestone street with tram tracks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet cobblestone street, passing a stationary streetcar on the left side

entered.detail: green and red vintage streetcar parked on the left side with metal rails running along the street
large two-story building with white columns and balconies at the end of the street
black cast iron street lamp with warm glowing light
historic cannon on wooden wheels displayed on the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet cobblestone street at night, passing a stationary vintage streetcar on the left. Gas lamps illuminate the historic brick buildings lining the street, with a large mansion visible at the end of the road and a cannon monument on the right sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic avenue with wooden sidewalks and scaffolding

events.description: horse-drawn carriage enters from the left and moves along the cobblestone street
camera passes the cannon monument on the right sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the moving horse-drawn carriage as it travels down the wet street

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with two horses moving forward along the street

entered.detail: closed wooden carriage with two horses pulling it, moving along the tram tracks
red octagonal stop sign mounted on a wooden pole
wooden construction scaffolding along the right building facade

segments.scene_description: A horse-drawn carriage enters from the left and moves along the cobblestone street. The camera passes the cannon monument on the right and continues walking alongside the carriage, with wooden scaffolding visible on the right buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined historic avenue with gas lamps

events.description: carriage pulls further ahead down the street, moving away from camera
pedestrian becomes visible walking in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: following behind the carriage as it moves further down the tree-lined avenue, rain visible in the lamplight

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving away into the distance down the wet street

entered.detail: mature trees with white-painted trunks lining the left side of the street
red brick building wall covered in dense green ivy
single person walking in the distance down the center of the street

segments.scene_description: Following the horse-drawn carriage as it moves further down the tree-lined street, with rain falling visibly in the warm glow of the gas lamps. The wet cobblestones reflect the lights, and a pedestrian appears walking in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a rainy historic street that transitions from a quiet, lamp-lit corridor into a dynamic scene of urban activity. It begins by gliding past a stationary vintage streetcar and brick buildings, with gas lamps casting a warm glow over the wet cobblestones toward a distant mansion. As the camera advances, it passes a cannon monument on the right sidewalk while the environment opens up to reveal wooden scaffolding clinging to the adjacent architecture. The scene then shifts as a horse-drawn carriage enters from the left, with the camera continuing its steady pace alongside the moving vehicle through the reflective nighttime street.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rainy historic street as it tracks a horse-drawn carriage moving deeper into the city. It begins by trailing the carriage through a tree-lined corridor, where visible rain falls through the warm, amber glow of gas lamps. As the camera advances, the focus shifts to the wet cobblestones below, which shimmer with vivid reflections of the artificial light. The scene then expands forward, following the carriage's path toward a lone pedestrian walking in the distance.
